fields.label: API Key
fields.helpText: From Resend Dashboard -> API Keys -> Create API Key

healthcheck_config.description: Validates API key via Resend domains endpoint

metadata.summary: Resend modern email API for developers with React Email support.
metadata.setup_guide:
1. Go to resend.com/api-keys and sign in
2. Click 'Create API Key'
3. Give it a name and select the appropriate domain/permissions
4. Copy the re_... API key value
